category_sources: source_facts.description says makeself generates self-extracting compressed tar archives.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official makeself project site.

source_facts.repo identifies the official GitHub repository, whose README is an official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/megastep/makeself, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description describes self-extracting compressed tar archive generation.
source_facts.executables lists the makeself command-line tool.
